hook: I tried stop watching start building for 2 weeks. Here's what happened.
body:
6 months ago I had zero products, zero revenue, zero system.
Then I found Claude Code and built a system.
Now I have 89 products and growing.
cta: Comment 'system' and I'll send you the blueprint.
